RAHHHH I AM ALIVE!! Oml I've been gone for a hot minute huh? Unfortuntely I think I won't be posting as much for now, since I've kinda just been a bit overwhelmed recently- getting alot of shit done 😈. I actually haven't been able to be on site as much as I'd like unfortunately :(. I hope all of you are doing well though, I really miss everyone on here <33

I have one fun bot idea I wanna get out before that Marion opposite POV but it is on its way :DD. Sorry guys pls blame my hyperactive brain... I will accept all criticism... 😔

And to address the elephant in the room... I have no regrets on my little april fools antics 🤭. Some people actually did want me to make a carrd though which I will have to think about... I might have some actual surveys coming out with the next bot so keep an eye out ;). LOVE YOU ALL BE HEALTHY BE KIND KEEP SPREADING POSITIVITY!!
